person_name: John, native of Palestine and chief of the treasury under Justinian
person_name_full: John, native of Palestine and chief of the treasury under Justinian
notes: John, native of Palestine, served as chief of the treasury under Emperor Justinian; described as gentle and honest.

docs.title: CHAPTER XXII
docs.author: Procopius
docs.excerpt: … was a native of Palestine, a good and gentle man, who did not even know how to find out the means of increasing his private fortune, and had never done injury to a single individual.
